title: pilosella × polymastix
intro: Pilosella × polymastix is a hybrid plant species within the Asteraceae family, resulting from the cross between Pilosella officinarum and Pilosella caespitosa. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its saponin and sesquiterpene content. The health benefits of Pilosella × polymastix include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against various pathogens. Pilosella × polymastix can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
